products.name: Garnier Whole Blends Honey Water Moisture Restoring Shampoo 370 ml
products.description: A lightweight, deeply hydrating shampoo from the Garnier Whole Blends line, inspired by natural honey hive goodness. Enriched with Honey Water to restore essential moisture to dry, dull, or dehydrated hair without weighing it down. Gently cleanses impurities while infusing strands with hydration, softness, manageability, and natural shine. Paraben-free formula that maintains the hair's natural moisture balance, creates a rich lather, and leaves hair feeling revived, supple, and revitalized. Ideal for daily use on dry to normal hair types seeking lightweight moisture and a healthy glow. Imported from Canada.
products.how_to_use: Apply a generous amount to wet hair, massage into a rich lather, and rinse thoroughly. For best results, follow with the Garnier Whole Blends Honey Water Moisture Restoring Conditioner and other products in the Honey Water line.

products.name: Garnier Whole Blends Honey Water Moisture Restoring Shampoo 370 ml
products.description: A lightweight, deeply hydrating shampoo from the Garnier Whole Blends line, inspired by natural honey hive goodness. Enriched with Honey Water to restore essential moisture to dry, dull, or dehydrated hair without weighing it down. Gently cleanses impurities while infusing strands with hydration, softness, manageability, and natural shine. Paraben-free formula that maintains the hair's natural moisture balance, creates a rich lather, and leaves hair feeling revived, supple, and revitalized. Ideal for daily use on dry to normal hair types seeking lightweight moisture and a healthy glow. Imported from Canada.
products.how_to_use: Apply a generous amount to wet hair, massage into a rich lather, and rinse thoroughly. For best results, follow with the Garnier Whole Blends Honey Water Moisture Restoring Conditioner and other products in the Honey Water line.

products.name: Deep Repair Hair Mask
products.description: An intensive weekly mask that restores softness and shine to very dry, damaged strands. Helps reduce the look of split ends.
products.how_to_use: Apply on towel-dried hair from mid-lengths to ends, leave on for 10–15 minutes and rinse well.

products.name: Repair & Shine Conditioner
products.description: A rich conditioner that smooths frizz and repairs surface damage. Leaves hair soft, shiny and easy to detangle.
products.how_to_use: After shampooing, apply generously from mid-lengths to ends, leave for 3–5 minutes and rinse.

products.name: Daily Curl Softening Conditioner
products.description: An everyday conditioner that softens and detangles curls. Keeps them hydrated and easier to style.
products.how_to_use: Smooth through freshly washed hair, leave for 2–3 minutes and rinse. Can be used as a leave-in on very dry hair.
